creator: araujo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Please, use 'make makepatch' to create a proper patch format, also always when submit a PR with an update/new port, please make sure you use portlint(1).

Could you please, re-generate the patch files/patch-buildscripts_gen-ldflags.go as I said above and submit again the new diff?

Best Regards,
